steps.title: Multiply both sides by 188x to clear the denominator
steps.content:
Starting with $u = -\frac{w}{188x}$, multiply both sides by $188x$:

$$188x \cdot u = 188x \cdot \left(-\frac{w}{188x}\right)$$

$$188ux = -w$$

steps.title: Multiply by -1 to solve for w
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by $-1$ to isolate $w$:

$$w = -188ux$$

That matches choice A — A is correct.
